question: Return the distinct names of customers who have ever bought any product in the 'Electronics' category OR any product in the 'Books' category.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.cid = o.cid JOIN OrderItems oi ON o.oid = oi.oid JOIN Products p ON oi.pid = p.pid WHERE p.category = 'Electronics' UNION SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.cid = o.cid JOIN OrderItems oi ON o.oid = oi.oid JOIN Products p ON oi.pid = p.pid WHERE p.category = 'Books';
